# output.posterior_table { #tspaint.output.posterior_table }

```python
tspaint.output.posterior_table(
    ts,
    Q,
    pi,
    emissions,
    focal=None,
    merge_tol=1e-12,
)
```

Per-sample ancestry posterior as contiguous segments covering ``[0, L)``.

Runs the down-pass per marginal tree and records each focal sample's posterior
and info-status; adjacent identical segments are merged.

## Parameters {.doc-section .doc-section-parameters}

<code>[**ts**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[tskit](`tskit`).[TreeSequence](`tskit.TreeSequence`)]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   The tree sequence whose marginal trees are pruned.

<code>[**Q**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K, K) numpy.ndarray]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Ancestry CTMC generator.

<code>[**pi**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [(K,) array_like]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Root frequencies ``π`` (the prior fallback on uninformative spans).

<code>[**emissions**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [numpy](`numpy`).[ndarray](`numpy.ndarray`)\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per-sample emission vector (see :func:`tspaint.em.build_emissions`).

<code>[**focal**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[iterable](`iterable`)\[[int](`int`)\]]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [None]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Samples to record; defaults to every sample in ``ts``.

<code>[**merge_tol**]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[float](`float`)]{.parameter-annotation} [ = ]{.parameter-default-sep} [1e-12]{.parameter-default}</code>

:   Absolute tolerance for merging adjacent segments with equal posterior. Default ``1e-12``.

## Returns {.doc-section .doc-section-returns}

<code>[]{.parameter-name} [:]{.parameter-annotation-sep} [[dict](`dict`)\[[int](`int`), [list](`list`)\[[Segment](`tspaint.output.Segment`)\]\]]{.parameter-annotation}</code>

:   Per focal sample, the down-pass posterior as contiguous :class:`Segment`\ s covering ``[0, L)``.
